briefing.title: Sell-Through Rate vs. Competitors
briefing.detail: Purse Maison sold 30 units MTD (₱9.56M) on 1,592 inventory — a 1.9% sell-through rate — while Miss Manila Luxe leads volume at 75 units on only 486 inventory (15.4% STR) and The Orange Box leads revenue at ₱35.89M on 21 units.
briefing.action: Benchmark our STR against Miss Manila Luxe and The Orange Box; identify the top 20 slowest-moving SKUs for immediate markdown or bundle promotion to close the gap.

briefing.title: Inventory Overhang Risk
briefing.detail: We carry 1,592 units worth ₱286.1M — the largest inventory value in the market — yet our ₱179,720 avg ticket is below The Orange Box (₱221,378) and Shop with K (₱334,763), suggesting pricing may not reflect our stock quality.
briefing.action: Audit the top 30 highest-value items stagnating beyond 15 days and reassess pricing versus the market range on each hero model immediately.

briefing.title: Hermès Birkin & Kelly Are Moving
briefing.detail: Hermès Birkin and Kelly are in our top sold models MTD, consistent with The Orange Box (Birkin) and Shop with K (Birkin, Constance) — confirming strong market-wide demand for Hermès hardware.
briefing.action: Prioritize restocking Birkin 25/30 and Kelly 25/28 — our live counts (6, 4, 6, 11) are adequate but lowest asks are 26–53% above market floor, which may be suppressing conversions.

briefing.title: Hermès Pricing Premium vs. Market Floor
briefing.action: Review condition and hardware type on these entry-price units — if A-grade or better, hold premium; if standard condition, bring Kelly 28 entry price closer to ₱550,000–₱580,000 to capture the volume The Orange Box is already taking.

briefing.title: Chanel Double Flap Jumbo — Overexposed
briefing.detail: We hold 23 Chanel Double Flap Jumbos (our largest single-model position), with our lowest ask at ₱188,000 matching the market floor — yet Chanel accounts for only 24.8% of our brand mix and Jumbo is not in our top-sold list MTD.
briefing.action: Cap fresh Jumbo intake and run a targeted promo (e.g., loyalty-first preview at ₱175,000–₱180,000) on the slowest-selling Jumbo units to reduce exposure and free capital.

briefing.title: Low-Ticket Segment Threat from Miss Manila Luxe & Canone
briefing.detail: Miss Manila Luxe (avg ticket ₱38,920, 75 units sold) and Canone Bags Prime (avg ticket ₱33,413) are dominating volume in the sub-₱100K segment where we have limited presence — their combined 83 units dwarf our 30 MTD.
briefing.action: Do not compete on price in the sub-₱100K tier; instead, use our Hermès/Chanel depth to position Purse Maison as the authenticated premium destination and differentiate with certification messaging.

alerts: The Orange Box is generating ₱35.89M in inferred sold value on just 21 units (avg ₱1.71M/unit) — significantly higher than our ₱9.56M on 30 units; they are likely moving exotic or rare Hermès hardware we are not sourcing.

Mini Kelly (Kelly 20): our lowest ask is ₱1,540,000 vs. market highest at ₱1,680,000 — we are priced near the ceiling with only 2 live units; if these are exotic/special order, hold; if standard, review downward to ₱1,200,000–₱1,350,000.

Constance 24: our floor is ₱534,500 vs. market floor of ₱395,000 (+35.3%) — with 7 units live and 16 market-wide, we risk being skipped by price-sensitive buyers; review the ₱395,000–₱450,000 competitive band.

A&J Luxury and Canone Bags Prime have very low sold values (₱454K and ₱571K) relative to large inventories (911 and 1,165 units) — watch for potential distressed liquidation events that could flood the mid-market.

Hermès Lindy is selling at A&J Luxury (avg ticket ₱90,821) but absent from our top-sold list — if we carry Lindy, audit pricing; if not, consider sourcing as an accessible Hermès entry point alongside Picotin.

pricing.suggestion: Our floor of ₱1,288,000 is 35.6% above the market floor of ₱950,000; unless condition or hardware justifies the premium, introduce at least one unit at ₱1,050,000–₱1,100,000 to capture price-sensitive Birkin buyers currently going elsewhere.

Floor of ₱770,000 vs. market floor ₱575,000 (+33.9%); add a ₱620,000–₱650,000 entry unit to compete directly with The Orange Box on accessible Birkin 30 demand while keeping premium units above ₱900,000.

Our floor ₱735,000 is 53.1% above the ₱480,000 market floor across 28 market listings — the most exposed gap in the lineup; introduce a ₱530,000–₱560,000 entry price on a standard-grade unit to drive conversion volume.
With 7 units live and a floor of ₱534,500 vs. market floor ₱395,000, reposition the most entry-level unit to ₱420,000–₱440,000 to stay competitive without undermining the rest of the stack.

23 units live at a floor matching the market low of ₱188,000 — run a quiet loyalty-channel offer at ₱175,000–₱180,000 on the 3–5 oldest units to reduce overstock while protecting public list price integrity.

12 units live; our floor ₱280,000 is 13.9% above the market floor of ₱245,900 across 29 listings — hold current floor if condition grades are strong, but flag any C-grade units for markdown to ₱255,000 to keep them competitive.
